trigger_email_summary: A fictional retail credit listing remains incorrect after a correction request, and the response does not confirm that bureau records were updated.

timeline_events.summary: Synthetic credit bureau listing shows a stale retail account status. Redaction warning: do not store real bureau reports or ID numbers.
Demo user requested correction and supplied fictional proof of settlement.
Retailer says the issue was reviewed but does not provide a bureau correction instruction or completion date.

extracted_deadlines.action_required: Escalate correction request and ask for bureau update proof.

evidence_matrix.why_it_matters: Would prove the balance/status should change.
Needed to prove the retailer instructed correction.

recommended_next_action: Prepare a bureau correction escalation packet with the stale listing summary, synthetic settlement proof placeholder, and request for written correction confirmation.
draft_reply_outline: Summarize the incorrect listing in synthetic terms.
Ask for written confirmation that the bureau was instructed to correct it.
State intended escalation to credit dispute channels if unresolved.

telegram_card_preview.title: DP-CREDIT-001: Retail bureau correction gap
telegram_card_preview.body: Medium priority. Listing remains stale; correction proof missing. Deadline 2026-07-26. Recommended: escalate correction packet.

redaction_required.warning: Replace real bureau reports, ID numbers, addresses, account numbers, settlement letters, and exact correspondence with synthetic summaries.
